title: Accept Suggestion Chip for Next Action

findings.description: No suggestion chips are visible in the chat interface. The new chat view shows template cards (e.g. 'Generate a dashboard layout', 'Scaffold an API integration') but these are starter templates, not contextual suggestion chips.
findings.expected: Clickable suggestion chips should appear during or after chat responses suggesting next actions.
findings.actual: Only template starter cards exist below the input. No contextual suggestion chips in the chat flow.

verdict: Feature not implemented. Template starters exist but not contextual suggestion chips for next actions.
